title: Battling a Deadly Ebola Outbreak in Eastern Congo
summary_full: At the heart of the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo, health care workers are racing to open new treatment centers and ramp up testing. But after years of war, the deadly virus is just one of many challenges they’re facing.
